commit_recommendation.git_commit: git commit -m 'record spec history for ISSUE-91A'
commit_recommendation.message: It is recommended to commit this history directory now: specs/.history/issue-91-force-scripts-cli-dep-cleanup/ticket-000-ISSUE-91A

history_policy: append-only by convention; existing entries are not overwritten and filesystem permissions remain git-friendly
summary: Closed ISSUE-91A after implementing and validating install/sync --force-scripts.

assertions: install --force-scripts reruns a skill-script dep with a matching fingerprint and existing binary.
sync --force-scripts reruns a skill-script dep with a matching fingerprint and existing binary.
force-scripts does not skip or weaken the existing install policy gate for skill-script execution.

graph_after_unit_pass: Add smoke coverage only if the existing test graph already exercises real skill-script CLI deps.
model_state: Normal install/sync skip unchanged skill-script reruns when current lock/artifact state already covers the script.
Force install/sync records the explicit forced script-rerun command result.
unit_tests: Regression coverage near the existing skill-script fingerprint rerun fixture.
CLI parse/help coverage for install --force-scripts and sync --force-scripts.

ticket.objective: Add install/sync force flags that rerun skill-script deps even when the stored fingerprint matches and the declared binary still exists.
ticket.title: Add force-scripts command plumbing
